track.name: I'll Take Care of You (feat. Yebba)

wiki.summary: “I’ll Take Care of You” is the ninth track off Tyler, The Creator’s ninth studio album, DON’T TAP THE GLASS. The song is about Tyler caring about this person of interest so much that he feels the need to express that he’ll take care of them. The song samples lyrics from Crime Mob’s “Knuck If You Buck”, while also sampling his own song CHERRY BOMB off his fourth studio album Cherry Bomb, specifically the drums. Read more on Last.fm.
